programmes.show_description: While Benson tries to help the gang member who attacked her, Duarte reveals a shocking piece of evidence in the case. Fin is tasked with hiring new detectives for the Bronx SVU.
As Benson and Carisi put a vengeful crime boss on trial, Fin tries to help a woman who was drugged and left for dead; Velasco takes drastic action to get information from a witness.
When the only evidence in a crime is through a church confession, Carisi must find another way to prove his suspect guilty. Benson agrees to meet an old friend seeking to make amends.
Series finale. The SVU provides help and protection for a longtime domestic violence victim, but when she winds in court, Rollins surprises Carisi with a formidable opponent at trial.
Ryan and Dylan get their biggest lead in the Sleeping Beauty Killer case, taking them to a faceoff aboard a ship. Dylan receives troubling news from his father.
A man in between jobs takes up a sketchy method of earning money. Deputies strongly question the legitimacy of a man's work van.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend's honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday.
Erin's trial against a human trafficker is jeopardised when the presiding judge is found dead. Mayor Dutton opposes Frank's public safety initiative.
A detective in a mob case is killed. Garrett is accosted outside his home by a SWAT team after a false report.
Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a single mother whose ex-husband has a history of violence. Jamie's efforts to save a woman who overdosed on drugs has unexpected consequences.
When a famous basketball player is found dead in his apartment of an apparent drug overdose, Danny looks into ties to old friends in a local gang.
A case turns personal for Danny when he works to protect a nurse from her violent ex-boyfriend. An acquaintance of Frank's comes to him with a theory regarding the death of an inmate.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Police drama series. Hetty puts Callen's safety ahead of her own. The team swoop into Romania to save her, but the unexpected appearance of Agent Hunter raises questions.
Drama series following a team of agents who investigate crimes connected to military personnel. The team join forces with the NSA when a computer expert is kidnapped.
US police drama series. Sam goes undercover as a bomb specialist to investigate the murder of a marine. Hunter decides to change the dynamics of NCIS.
Specialised police drama series. The team delve into the underground world of the Libyan resistance movement when a reporter is murdered. Callen learns more about his past.
Police drama series. The team investigates an alliance between al-Qaeda and a Mexican drug cartel. A female police chief works closely with Deeks, making Kensi jealous.
Police drama series. The team investigate the brutal murder of a former Navy intelligence officer, and soon learn that Hetty is key to finding the killer.
Police drama series. The team try to clear the name of a marine who was dishonorably discharged after being accused of murder.
Dylan and Lizzie investigate the deaths of family members who were also business partners in a craft brewery. Andy's legal expertise is needed for an issue in the adoption process.
A car accident leads the detectives on a search for an ambulance driver assaulting his charges; Fin gives Detective Bruno a tour of Manhattan SVU.
A recently released convict goes looking for his arresting officer, Fin Tutuola; Carisi tries to get an arrest warrant without a positive suspect ID.
When Benson and Stabler assist in the case of a young girl's shooting, they realise it's more than a typical homicide.
A group of teens terrorising tourists has the SVU squad working overtime; McGrath teams them up with the Bronx gang unit to track down a crucial lead.
Logan and Wheeler investigate the apparent kidnapping of an internet star and her boyfriend. Are they dealing with an elaborate hoax?
Logan and Wheeler probe the fatal overdose of a young man who was heir to a massive fortune. The trail leads to the victim's gold-digging mother.
A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A skittish driver's decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat.
Crime writer and amateur sleuth Jessica Fletcher is invited to the desert town of Gila Junction by a friend who suspects it is the site of dangerous chemical experiments.
A haunted spirit and antique smugglers are just a few challenges Jessica faces on her Irish vacation.
Jessica is trapped in the dungeon of an ancient Irish castle, but uses her ingenuity to get rescued and find the treasure and a murderer.
Eddie's judgment is clouded when she arrests a loathed college acquaintance. Frank is hesitant to mar the spotless record of a member of the force who tested positive for marijuana.
Danny and Baez join a narcotics task force to track a drug supplier. Jamie and Eddie work to protect a rehabilitated sex offender. Frank forms an unlikely alliance with Mayor Dutton.
Jamie and Eddie ask Erin to drop the charges against a man who bravely rescued a woman from a local hostage situation. Danny and Baez work a case involving car thieves.
When a journalist disappears while working on an expose about an innocent man serving time for murder, Danny and Baez hope that re-examining the original case will help them find her.
Erin enlists Danny to find out who shot Anthony when he was searching for a witness for an upcoming murder trial.
Drama series following the Special Projects wing of the US navy's dedicated federal agency. A smuggling case takes the NCIS team to Mexico to find missing hazardous materials.
Specialised police drama series. Sam returns to Sudan to help a CIA agent gather evidence of Al-Qaeda terrorists in training, but events do not go as planned.
Police drama series. When Deeks shoots an unarmed man, LAPD blames NCIS for ruining their joint operation and breaks ties with them
Police drama series. The team are embroiled in a race against the clock to find a classified and highly dangerous device which could destroy Los Angeles.
Specialised police drama series. Assistant Director Owen Granger makes an impression on the team. Nell goes undercover at the Department of Defence to solve a murder.
A man with dementia confesses to murder, but Benson and Carisi believe there's more to the case. When rumors swirl around the squad room, Fin presses Velasco for the truth.
